qas.a:
How old must a representative be and how long must they have been a resident of their state?
a. 35 years old and 10 years
b. 25 years old and 7 years
c. 30 years old and 5 years
d. 20 years old and 14 years

We the ___ of the United States, in Order to form a ___ perfect Union, establish Justice, insure domestic ___, provide for the common defense, promote the ___ Welfare, and secure the Blessings of ___ to ourselves and our Posterity, do ordain and establish this ___ for the United States of America.
a. People, more, tranquility, standard, Independence, Constitution
b. Citizens, truly, Tranquility, standard, Liberty, Establishment
c. People, more, Tranquility, general, Liberty, Constitution
d. None of the above

When will Congress assemble?
a. Once every year on the first Monday.
b. 3 Times a year in January, March and August.
c. Once a year on the first Monday of December
d. Once a year in December
How far and how long did the first recorded flight of an aircraft last?
On what date did Congress authorize the construction of the United States Air Force Academy?

Traditions at USAFA, to include spirit missions and banners, are acceptable if they are ___, or ___ and ___.
a) Destructive, self-promoting, selfish, silly.
b) socially acceptable, not harmful or destructive in nature, contribute in a positive manner to the identity of USAFA
c) colorful/creative, original, take place in Mitchell hall
d) legal/moral, inexpensive, socially acceptable

On what day and what year was the P-51 Mustang Memorial donated?
a. 3 July 1989
b. 3 July 1988
c. 3 June 1989
d. 3 June 1988

How many combat missions were included in General Hansford T. Johnson's flying career?
e. 450
f. 432
g. 342
h. 423
In what year did General Curtis E. LeMay command the XX and XXI Bomber Commands?
What award did General James H. "Jimmy" Doolittle receive following the bombing run on Tokyo?

What words are inscribed on the pentagon shaped base of the 9/11 memorial?
a. World Trade Center
b. The Pentagon
c. Shanksville, Pa.
d. All of the above

What type of aircraft did General Douhet claim should be employed in mass numbers?
e. Attack
f. Refueling
g. Rescue
h. Bomber
Who became the Army's first enlisted pilot?

Which Amendment refers to the quartering of soldiers in houses?
a. 3rd Amendment
b. 7th Amendment
c. 5th Amendment
d. 1st Amendment
On what day and in what year did Operation ROLLING THUNDER begin?

To which body parts did Captain Lance P. Sijan sustain injuries?
a) Skull fracture
b) Mangled right hand
c) Compound fracture in left leg
d) All of the above
Who was the first Air Force ace of the Vietnam War? Rank (not current) and name
Give the name and rank of the first USAFA graduate to die in combat? (Rank on probook)

Cadet will abide by the rules and personal and professional appearance standards as outlines in _______.
a) AFI 36-2903
b) AFI 29-3306
c) AFI 33-2202
d) AFI 36-2902

Of which program is Schriever considered the Founding Father?
a) U.S. Space Program
b) Russian Space Program
c) U.S. Nuclear Weapons Program
d) U.S. Chemistry Program
What unmanned aircraft system is located in the Southwest corner of the Mitchell Hall dining area? (Full name given in Contrails)
On what day, month , and year did the U.S. Army establish an Aeronautical Division of the Signal Corps?
What class year funded the replica of the USAFA War Memorial?

What did Captain Stovall and his crew brave during their mission to rescue a downed Airman?
a) MiGs
b) SAMs
c) Anit-aircraft artillery
d) Small arms fire
e) All of the above
How many Americans did Captain Charles T. McMillan II rescue from Iran?

From what dates did Glacier serve as the gyrfalcon mascot?
a. August 1980-July 1995
b. July 1981-August 1996
c. July 1980-August 1995
d. August 1981-July 1996
Give the name of the only person to serve as Cadet Wing Commander twice.
What was the title of Brigadier General William "Billy" Mitchell's first book?
On what date did General Carl A. "Tooey" Spaatz become the first Chief of Staff of the Air Force?
In what year did the distinguished graduate Gregg Popovich graduate?

When may an individual be convicted of Treason?
a. The Testimony of two Witnesses to the same over act.
b. Confession in open Court.
c. When deemed necessary.
d. Both a and b.
How many North American B-25 Mitchell medium bombers took off from the carrier in the Doolittle Raids?
Who made their first and fifth kill sin the McDonell-Douglas F-4D Phantom II located in the southeast corner of the terrazzo?

Failure to obey a lawful order is a violation of article ___ of the UCMJ.
a) 91
b) 88
c) 102
d) 92
What is the name of the Shuttle Major (now Major General) Susan J. Helms rode in?
